title: What does the next training paradigm look like?
summary: Dwarkesh Patel explores the next paradigm in neural network training, examining grindability and verifiability as critical properties, questioning whether RLVR (reinforcement learning via verifiable rewards) alone can generalize, discussing how learning gets encoded into weights, and offering predictions about training approaches in 2027.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel examines what could succeed current neural network training methods, centering on two properties: grindability and verifiability. The discussion questions whether RLVR (reinforcement learning via verifiable rewards) can generalize on its own, and considers how learning becomes encoded into model weights. The video closes with predictions about what training approaches will look like in 2027.
